name: Ibuprofen
notes: NSAID - causes GI ulcers and renal failure

name: Acetaminophen
notes: Causes hepatic necrosis - especially fatal in cats

name: Aspirin

name: Caffeine

name: Metronidazole
notes: Safe at therapeutic doses for pets

name: Amoxicillin
notes: Common antibiotic - generally safe

name: Doxycycline

name: Diphenhydramine

name: Furosemide
notes: Diuretic used in veterinary medicine

name: Prednisone
notes: Steroid used in vet medicine

name: Tramadol
notes: Opioid painkiller used in dogs

name: Gabapentin
notes: Anticonvulsant used in pets

name: Meloxicam

name: Carprofen
notes: Vet-approved NSAID for dogs

name: Clindamycin
notes: Antibiotic for anaerobic infections in pets

name: Metformin
notes: Can cause GI upset and lactic acidosis

name: Itraconazole
notes: Antifungal used in pets

name: Ketoconazole

name: Atenolol
